title: The Giant Jack Becomes the Road
description: Luffy returns to the final battle against Enel, refusing to let the self-proclaimed god erase Skypiea or the old promise.
scene: Across pages 10, 11, 12, 13, this scene focuses on Luffy, Conis, Calgara, Enel, Nami. Luffy returns to the final battle against Enel, refusing to let the self-proclaimed god erase Skypiea or the old promise.

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: I have to get back to them!

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: Return to your rightful place, Skypica!

summary: Luffy returns to the final battle against Enel, refusing to let the self-proclaimed god erase Skypiea or the old promise.
